name: Spright Starter
name_jp: スプライト・スターター
desc: Special Summon 1 "Spright" monster from your Deck, but lose LP equal to its original ATK, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except Level/Rank/Link 2 monsters. You can only activate 1 "Spright Starter" per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Spright" monster from your Deck, but lose LP equal to its original ATK, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except Level/Rank/Link 2 monsters. You can only activate 1 "Spright Starter" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Level specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Rank specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Link Rating specific monsters
